title: Watchdog
policy_ids_hint: Comma-separated list of policy IDs to approve exceptions for
expires_days_hint: Leave blank for a permanent exception (no expiry)
no_violations: No violations found for this resource.
no_classifications: No classifications recorded for this resource.
no_exceptions: No exceptions on record for this resource.
exception_approved: Exception approved. The violation will be suppressed on the next scan.
justification_placeholder: Describe why this exception is warranted (min. 10 characters)
confirm_revoke_description: This will revoke the exception for resource {{resource}} / policy {{policy}}. The violation will reopen on the next scan.
exception_revoked: Exception revoked. The violation will reopen on the next scan.
bulk_revoke_description: This will revoke {{count}} expired exception(s). Violations will reopen on the next scan.
yaml_locked_description: This policy is managed in git. Edit the YAML file and redeploy to change it.
